title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Cole Medin benchmarked mixed-provider LLM workflows using Claude Opus and Kimi K2.6 across four configuration variants on three GitHub issues. An Opus-based evaluator scored all 12 PRs on seven code quality dimensions to determine the optimal role assignment for each provider.
